  compare                 Compare one swagger file to another

  embedded                List embedded resources

  build                   Build the SDK

  create                  Create a new template file for a new SDK

  diff                    Report on differences from previous swagger file

  complete-patch-notes    Create unified patch notes for all swagger files in a
                          folder

  get-patch-notes         Get patch notes in Markdown for the current build

  get-release-name        Get the release name for the current build

  help                    Display more information on a specific command.

  version                 Display version information.
